backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a clothing store with product, cart, and order types; includes store initialization with sample products across four categories and CRUD-style operations using Map collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the price formatting utility in frontend/src/lib/utils.ts was updated to use Indian Rupee (INR) formatting with the en-IN locale, with high confidence tied to test REQ-26.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for all frontend source files, describing their purpose, styling choices, and notable recent changes across components, pages, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base layer defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, border, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and mounts the React app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app file that configures TanStack Router with seven routes (home, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin) all nested under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer component displaying the Dhimayu Studio logo, collections links, studio links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with a centered logo, desktop category navigation buttons, an Admin link, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, a main content Outlet, and a Footer in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image placeholder, hover quick-add button, and product info (name, sizes, price), linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, AuthClient management, and a React context provider/hook for accessing identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for the app including product CRUD, cart operations, and order management, each delegating to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost) and defining a warm neutral Tailwind CSS design system with light/dark mode CSS variables for the Dhimayu Studio brand.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions and constants including class merging (cn), INR price formatting, and category label/slug/image mappings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin page for managing products with a table listing, add/edit dialog form, and delete confirmation dialog, backed by product CRUD mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with a list of cart items, quantity controls (increment/decrement/remove), and an order summary with subtotal and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Displays a product catalog page filtered by category, with category tab navigation, loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a responsive product grid.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Provides a checkout form for customer name and delivery address, displays an order summary with line items and subtotal, and handles order placement with validation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero banner, brand statement section, and a grid of category cards that navigate to the catalog; auto-initializes the store if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows a post-order confirmation screen with a success icon, order reference ID from URL search params, and links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's details including name, price, stock status, size selection, and an add-to-cart button with loading and success feedback states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Dhimayu Studio frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 27) for the Dhimayu Studio garments app, recording existing features (homepage, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, etc.), architectural notes, known issues, and requirement mappings.
